calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Chiu is present.
Attorney Stanley Shen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Patrick Sabari is present.
Attorney Ming Chung representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle. Plaintiff's attorney left the settlement conference before concluded.

The trial date of JAN-09-2012 remains.
